title: GET /waitlist/has-pending — Request & Response
description: Synchronous HTTP endpoint on the Waitlist Service consulted by the Inventory ReservationExpiryWorker before deciding whether to release a seat to the general pool.

eventId.description: Concert event ID to check for active waitlist entries in 'pending' status.

hasPending.description: true if there is at least one WaitlistEntry with status='pending' for the given eventId.

pendingCount.description: Number of entries in 'pending' status. Optional — for informational purposes.

caller_behavior.if_hasPending_true: Publish 'reservation-expired' WITHOUT calling seat.Release(). The Waitlist Service manages the seat.
caller_behavior.if_hasPending_false: Call seat.Release() as usual, then publish 'reservation-expired'. Normal inventory flow.
caller_behavior.if_503_or_timeout: Fallback: call seat.Release() and publish 'reservation-expired' (original behavior preserved). Log warning.

performance_requirements.description: The call must be fast to not delay the ReservationExpiryWorker polling cycle. Query uses idx_waitlist_fifo index.
